creator: freebsd.contact@marino.st
text:
This basically started a new PR instead of continuing with ports/179795
which is the same topic.

That one suggests using
"SF/pmt/${PORTNAME}/old-versions/1.7/${PORTVERSION}/" as the second
master site so that to minimize (or eliminate) the effects of archiving
the tarball.

I agree with that suggestion.  It would have prevented the last two
breakages of PNG.
